companies.name: ON SEMICONDUCTOR CORP
companies.rationale: Major player in the semiconductor industry, providing a wide range of semiconductors and system solutions for various markets.

companies.name: CVD EQUIPMENT CORP
companies.rationale: Engages in the development and manufacturing of chemical vapor deposition equipment and services for the semiconductor industry.

overall_rationale: The scope focuses on companies directly involved with semiconductors and related equipment, with ON Semiconductor and CVD Equipment as examples. The analysis will utilize annual, quarterly, and significant event filings from the past three years to provide insight into industry trends and company-specific developments in the semiconductor sector.
